## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Muhammad Talha and Marcel Santilli to discuss potential collaboration opportunities at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company, GrowthX, is experiencing rapid growth (5.3M ARR, 35 clients) with an AI-powered content marketing approach](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [GrowthX uses a hybrid model of AI + human experts, organized into "pods" led by managing directors](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Talha has a strong background in content marketing and SEO, currently working at Weed](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Potential for Talha to join GrowthX part-time (up to 20 hours/week), pending legal/visa considerations](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [GrowthX started with Marcel sharing his content marketing strategies through workshops](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Evolved into a service helping companies implement AI-powered content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Reached 5.3M ARR with 35 clients since November, projecting 20M this year](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Recently raised funds to support rapid growth and hiring (aiming for 100 employees by June)](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

### GrowthX's Approach

  - [Combines AI-powered workflows with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Uses "pods" led by managing directors, with editors, writers, and production assistants](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Focuses on building trust through high-quality content, then converting audience to customers](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Offers comprehensive 12-week onboarding process for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### Talha's Background

  - [Started in content marketing in 2015, first proper job in 2017](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Worked at Animalz (content marketing agency) for 2 years](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Currently at Weed, overseeing SEO and non-SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Drove 210k ARR from blog content at Weed last year](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Talha expressed interest in testing GrowthX's product](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Marcel open to Talha joining part-time, possibly in an advisory capacity](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Discussed minimum time commitment and consistency requirements](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Need to address legal/visa considerations for Talha working as an international contractor](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)

### GrowthX's Hiring Plans

  - [Rapidly expanding team (30 to 100 people by June)](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Hiring two recruiters to support growth](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Primarily seeking full-time employees, but open to exploring part-time arrangements in Talha's case](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Talha to consult with lawyer regarding legal/visa implications of part-time work](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Talha to consider minimum time commitment he can offer consistently](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Talha to follow up with Marcel by Friday with more information](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [Marcel to potentially introduce Talha to Kyle (team member) for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/p8sSebeELU72ERuXT-fZzz_yyS89zFbF?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
